{"description":"Explore codebase structure","prompt":"Explore the codebase at /home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester to understand:
1. The project structure (key directories)
2. Existing API routes in src/app/api/
3. The Certificates, Enrollments, Modules, Lessons, Gradebook collections
4. Existing patterns for API routes (how they handle errors, use getPayload, etc.)
5. The gradebook-payload service
6. Any existing test patterns for API routes

Look at:
- src/app/api/ structure and example routes
- src/collections/ (certificates, enrollments, lessons, modules)
- src/services/gradebook-payload.ts
- src/app/api/certificates/ directory if it exists
- src/app/api/enroll/route.ts or similar enrollment routes
- src/app/api/quizzes/[id]/submit/route.ts for reference patterns
- Any existing route.test.ts files to understand test patterns

Report back with file paths and key patterns found.","subagent_type":"Explore"}
